BuildingFacilities_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "B80ADB0A4F30E1150AE7D6B8707EAA96", "Building the <Important>Outpost</> is done using <Important>Build Mode</>.

You can open <Important>Build Mode</> with <Cyan>(B)</> to view available construction categories.

<Important>Facilities</> are a type of construction which can perform various tasks - allowing you to refine materials, craft or store items, purchase new building plans, and more.

To get the <Important>Outpost</> started, you will need to construct a <Facility>Makeshift Smelter</> using the <Item>Metal Scrap</> you can gather around you.


Once you have picked up at least three scrap, open <Important>Build Mode</> and turn to the next page.")

BuildingFacilities_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "C70FBA814D6F0232A8A0C68ADB57E143", "With Build Mode active, select the Facilities category and then select the Makeshift Smelter. When you select something for construction, a 'Ghost' of that object will appear in the world at your cursor location. It can be rotated with (MMB Scroll). It will glow blue when in a valid location and orange when it cannot be built. You can see the cost of the construction by hovering over its icon. With the Makeshift Smelter selected, use (LMB) to place it at a clear location when the 'Ghost' is valid (blue).")
